is different from: discard any existing Session and start a new Session

is equal to: has a length of zero bytes

is between X and Y: with the following values: 0 (0x00) Success sent by Server meaning authentication is successful; 24 (0x18) Continue authentication sent by Client or Server meaning continue the authentication with another step; 25 (0x19) Re-authenticate sent by Client meaning initiate a re-authentication

follows: in the order they were published

is equal to: is not incremented if it is already equal to
is greater than: with a Return Code of 0x80 or greater

is dependent on: have authority to publish data on
